findings.title: Authentication Weakness Detected
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to authentication have been detected, indicating potential weaknesses in the authentication flow that could lead to unauthorized access.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are not fully secure.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough security review of the authentication process and implement necessary improvements.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance authentication mechanisms and conduct security audits.

findings.title: Compliance Risk Identified
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to compliance have been detected, indicating potential violations of GDPR or CCPA regulations regarding data handling.
assumptions: Data handling practices may not align with regulatory requirements.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a legal review of data handling practices to ensure compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

metadata.mitigation: Review and adjust data handling practices to comply with regulations.

findings.title: Accessibility Risk Detected
findings.description: Low-risk keywords related to accessibility have been detected, indicating potential gaps in meeting WCAG AA standards.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not be fully implemented.

evidence.excerpt: Detected accessibility risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Review and enhance accessibility features to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.

metadata.mitigation: Improve accessibility features based on WCAG guidelines.

summary: Identified 3 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 security). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (2 blockers, 0 warnings).
